title: Commercial Appraiser
description:
Vanguard manages $8 trillion in global assets, serving millions of investors with a client-first philosophy since 1975.

We're seeking a Commercial Appraiser to join our Asset Management team in Boston. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive valuations of commercial real estate properties
Analyze comparable property sales and market conditions to determine fair value
Prepare detailed appraisal reports and supporting documentation
Interpret financial statements and property operating statements
Stay current on market trends and property valuation methodologies
Maintain professional credentials and comply with appraisal standards

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Real Estate, Finance, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 3-5 years of commercial real estate appraisal experience
certifications: State-licensed Commercial Real Estate Appraiser, MAI credential preferred

benefits: Competitive base salary with performance incentives
